name: Magic Missile
summary: Three glowing darts strike automatically for reliable force damage.

name: Cure Wounds
summary: Restore hit points to a creature you can touch.

name: Longsword
summary: Versatile slashing weapon dealing 1d8 damage, or 1d10 with two hands.

name: Shortbow
summary: Compact ranged weapon dealing 1d6 piercing damage.

name: Chain Mail
summary: Armor class 16 with strength and stealth tradeoffs.

name: Advantage
summary: Roll two d20s and use the higher result when conditions favor you.
